introSection: Boomerang (Chinese: 飞旋过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Wuhan Zhongshan Park in Jianghan, Wuhan, Hubei, China. It replaced the Roller Coaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Yellow track. This roller coaster has Arrow Dynamics-style track with square supports, similar to those found on Intimidator 305 at Kings Dominion.

fullText:
Boomerang (Chinese: 飞旋过山车) is a steel roller coaster located at Wuhan Zhongshan Park in Jianghan, Wuhan, Hubei, China. It replaced the Roller Coaster.

Yellow track. This roller coaster has Arrow Dynamics-style track with square supports, similar to those found on Intimidator 305 at Kings Dominion.
